caption: A close-up view of a vehicle's digital instrument cluster shows a dashboard display. On the left, a circular tachometer indicates "RPM x1000" with markings ranging from 3500 to 6000. To the right of the gauge, a digital screen displays the word "BRAKE" next to a red warning icon. Below this, white text instructs the driver to "Press Brake and Push Button to Start," followed by a mileage reading of "20434 mi". A red light is visible in the upper right area of the screen. Throughout the sequence, the display remains static, and no people are visible. The perspective shifts slightly, with a blurred white object appearing in the foreground and moving across the bottom of the frame, partially obscuring the dashboard.
